_comment: Central configuration for agent lists used by CI/CD workflows
_agent_build_args_comment: Per-agent opt-in build args for build/agents/Dockerfile.a2a. Valid keys: INSTALL_AWS_CLI, INSTALL_KUBECTL, INSTALL_GH_CLI, INSTALL_GLAB_CLI. Add an entry only when the agent genuinely invokes the CLI at runtime.
_mcp_build_args_comment: Per-agent opt-in build args for build/agents/Dockerfile.mcp. Valid keys: INSTALL_NETUTILS. Add an entry only when the MCP agent genuinely invokes network diagnostic tools at runtime.
